description: Sam Protected Files - Files that must NOT be overwritten with private content

core_documents.description: Core Sam documentation that differs from private setups
core_documents.validation: Must contain 'Sam' or 'Personal AI Infrastructure' in content

sam_infrastructure.validation: Must not contain references to private data

sanitized_config.description: Configuration files that must remain sanitized
sanitized_config.validation: Must not contain API keys, personal emails, or secrets

protected_patterns.description: String patterns that should never appear in Sam Public

private_to_public_workflow.description: How to safely sync private improvements to Sam Public
steps: 3. Identify which changes should go to public Sam
6. Sanitize any personal data or API keys
9. If validation passes, commit to Sam
10. If validation fails, check which protected files changed
